44.reason: [This loop condition assumes numbers are always followed by a space, but the input may end with '=' or have no trailing space. Also, it doesn't check for EOF or '=' which terminates the expression.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [This loop condition assumes numbers are always followed by a space, but the input may end with '=' or have no trailing space. Also, it doesn't check for EOF or '=' which terminates the expression.]

65.reason: [Same issue as above: assumes space delimiter, but expression ends with '=', and there may be no space before '=' or EOF. This can cause reading beyond valid input or infinite loop.]
